$comment: Extensible badge catalog for the slim-badges skill. Each badge is generated via img.shields.io; a static SVG snapshot lives alongside this file. The 'alt' field is the accessible alt text to use when embedding the badge in markdown. Add new badges by appending an entry that follows the same shape.

badges.label: Human-made
badges.alt: Human-made: written entirely by a human, with no AI generation
badges.description: Signals a document written entirely by a human, with no AI generation.

badges.label: AI-assisted
badges.alt: AI-assisted: written by a human with help from AI tools
badges.description: Signals a human-authored document created with AI help (drafting, editing, or suggestions).

badges.label: AI-generated
badges.alt: AI-generated: primarily produced by an AI model
badges.description: Signals a document primarily produced by an AI model.

badges.label: AI-autonomous
badges.alt: AI-autonomous: produced by an AI system acting autonomously, with no human in the loop
badges.description: Signals a document produced by an AI system acting autonomously, with no human in the loop.

badges.label: Best Practices from SLIM
badges.alt: Best Practices from SLIM: this project follows SLIM best practices
badges.description: Signals a project that follows SLIM (Software Lifecycle Improvement & Modernization) best practices.
